summary: Your Spring 2026 payment buttons are active again. Remaining balances: Andrea $691.00 and Camila $451.50 ($1,142.50 total before credits).
Sign in and pay: go to Payments → Upcoming Payments and click Pay Now on each row. Your approved credits ($190.00) will apply automatically at checkout.
You can also pay both balances in one checkout from the Pay in Full section on the same page.
Your 2026 membership is paid in full. If Pay Now still does not appear after refreshing, reply to this email.
